description: Fix escapeHtml breaking Markdown rendering + add MCP integration test
steps: In dashboard/templates/base.html: Remove `md = escapeHtml(md);` from renderMarkdown() so angle brackets render correctly in persona reasoning text
In src/augur/mcp_server.py: Extract ticker validation to a helper function _validate_ticker(ticker) that returns error string or None
In tests/test_iteration2.py: Add test_mcp_validate_ticker_function() that imports and calls _validate_ticker directly
acceptance_criteria: renderMarkdown() does NOT call escapeHtml() - angle brackets render as intended
escapeHtml() is still used for agent_name in stocks.html (untrusted content)
A _validate_ticker helper exists in mcp_server.py and is used by all 3 ticker-accepting tools
A test imports and calls _validate_ticker directly, verifying invalid tickers are rejected
